visual: Data Tables (Numeric Display). "Favorite Recess Activities" — Swings=30, Tag=50, Slides=40, Jump Rope=20. Vertical.
visual_2: Bar Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Vertical. Scale of 10, axis 0–60. 3 of 4 bars pre-filled: Tag=50, Slides=40, Jump Rope=20. Swings bar empty. Ghost gridlines at 10s visible. Snap-to-10 enabled. Click-to-set.
guide: "Now you create a bar. Swings has 30 votes. Set the HEIGHT for Swings to show 30."
prompt: "Set the HEIGHT for Swings to show 30."
student_action: Hover to preview, click to set bar height at 30
on_correct: "10, 20, 30. The bar ends at 30 on the axis. 30 votes for Swings."
remediation_light: "Find 30 on the axis. Set the bar HEIGHT to end there."
